input.title: ClickHouse Release 26.4
input.content: New JSON data type GA, faster S3 reads, 40 bug fixes. Upgrade notes inside.

input.title: Partial Prerendering is now stable
input.content: PPR graduates to stable in 15.5. How to adopt, config flags, and migration steps.

input.title: Fixed incorrect tax rounding on multi-currency invoices
input.content: Invoices with mixed currencies could round tax to the wrong minor unit. Resolved for all accounts.

input.title: Security advisory: WAF bypass via crafted header
input.content: We patched a bypass affecting custom rules. No customer action required; details and timeline below.

input.title: Foreign data wrappers: query Stripe from Postgres
input.content: New FDW ships today. Create a wrapper, map columns, and query external APIs as tables.

input.title: ClickHouse at FOSDEM: announcing ClickPipes GA
input.content: At our FOSDEM booth we launched ClickPipes GA — managed ingestion from Kafka with exactly-once delivery, available now.

input.title: How Globex cut infra costs 60% with Acme
input.content: Globex migrated 200 services to Acme and reduced spend dramatically. Read their story.

input.content: A roundup of what we shipped, upcoming webinars, and community highlights this month.

input.title: Recap: our week at KubeCon 2026
input.content: Great conversations at the booth, packed talks, and swag galore. Thanks for stopping by!

input.title: Acme joins the AWS ISV Accelerate Program
input.content: We are proud to announce our membership and a new strategic partnership with AWS.

input.title: Fivetran + dbt Labs Complete Merger to Create the Data Infrastructure for Trusted AI Agents
input.content: OAKLAND, Calif. — June 1, 2026 — Fivetran, the data foundation for AI, today announced the completion of its merger with dbt Labs, combining the two companies under one roof.

input.title: The dbt Developer Agent is now in Preview: the coding agent for analytics engineering
input.content: dbt Developer Agent is now available in Preview—grounded in your dbt project so you ship faster without breaking downstream.

input.title: How Notion built with Claude Managed Agents
input.content: Eric Liu from Notion shows how to delegate work to Claude directly inside a workspace. Engineers ship code with it; other teams build websites and presentations.

input.title: Introducing Claude Managed Agents
input.content: Claude Managed Agents is a suite of composable APIs for building and deploying agents at scale. Out of the box, it includes native MCP, tool integrations, memory, and all the infrastructure you need to ship fast.
